meta.description: Receives Uptime Kuma webhook alerts. When a service goes down, sends error details to LiteLLM Gateway (brawn-mini / phi4-mini) for analysis and fix suggestions, then posts an AI-generated remediation guide to Discord.
meta.setup: In Uptime Kuma: Settings → Notifications → Add → Webhook → URL: http://192.168.1.222:5678/webhook/uptime-kuma-alert

meta.description: Receives Uptime Kuma webhook alerts. When a service goes down, sends the error details to Ollama (phi4-mini) for analysis and fix suggestions, then posts an AI-generated remediation guide to Discord.
meta.setup: In Uptime Kuma: Settings → Notifications → Add → Webhook → URL: http://192.168.1.222:5678/webhook/uptime-kuma-alert
